description_long: This is a medium-sized, rectangular handbag with a structured silhouette and a roll-top flap closure. The main body is crafted from a smooth, brown leather-like material, while the central panel features a bold geometric pattern in black and cream, adding a striking visual contrast. A wide, matching brown strap runs vertically over the flap, securing it in place, and the bag is equipped with a long, adjustable shoulder strap attached with gold-tone hardware. The sides of the bag reveal the rolled nature of the top closure, which provides both security and a unique design element. The overall construction appears sturdy, with clean stitching and a flat base for stability. The interior is likely spacious, suitable for carrying personal items in an urban environment.
description: A brown leather-like handbag with a geometric black and cream patterned panel, roll-top flap, and a long adjustable shoulder strap with gold hardware.
description_view_0: Front view showing the geometric patterned panel, wide vertical strap over the flap, and the full length of the shoulder strap.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the rolled top closure and the thickness of the bag, with the strap and gold hardware visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain brown back and the continuation of the patterned panel, with the flap and strap visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the rolled top, strap attachment, and the bag's slim profile.
attribute_strap_type: Single long adjustable shoulder or crossbody strap, attached with gold-tone hardware at both ends.
attribute_closure_mechanism: Roll-top flap closure secured by a wide vertical strap; no visible zippers or snaps.
attribute_pattern: Geometric diamond pattern in black and cream on the central panel.
